name: growmodo/office-locations
title: Office Locations
description: Tab bar (static, per SOT) + office card grid.

body.default: Estatein is here to serve you across multiple locations. Whether you're looking to meet our team, discuss real estate opportunities, or simply drop by for a chat, we have offices conveniently located to serve your needs.

default.label: Main Headquarters
default.body: Our main headquarters serve as the heart of Estatein. Located in the bustling city center, this is where our core team of experts operates.

default.label: Regional Offices
default.body: Estatein's presence extends to multiple regions, each with its own dynamic real estate landscape.
